title: Bata India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Bata India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bata India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bata India:
Bata India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India!
